name: Urgent Notary Packet Builder
description: Builds a same-day notary readiness packet with document inventory, ID checklist, signer logistics, and verification prompts while avoiding legal advice.
author: OpenClaw Skills
target_user: People preparing for an urgent notarization appointment who need a practical readiness checklist.
use_cases: Preparing documents and ID for a notary appointment
Creating questions for the notary and receiving institution
Reducing missed requirements before an urgent appointment
